__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Amarna Letters,WLAN,Baopuzi,Optical Fiber Communication,Attic Nights,Mike
|rank=orange
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per 3 CIV Relics awakened, Snail Primeval Power +12; CIV Relics Awakened: 180/180
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:Enhanced by CIV Relics]]
[[Category:Primeval Power Boost]]
